channel.title: PowerShell on upyesp
channel.description: Recent content in PowerShell on upyesp

item.title: Use An Alias To Quickly Find Your IP Address
item.description: Here’s how to create Alias commands to simplify tasks on the command line. The examples given relate to retrieving IP addresses. The process is shown for Linux using Bash and Windows using PowerShell.

item.title: MySQL and Windows Terminal
item.description: MySQL has it’s own terminal emulator, providing a command-line interface (CLI) for the direct input and execution of SQL commands and scripts.

item.title: Adding Colour & Icons to File Listings in a Terminal
item.description: Adding icons and colour to folders and files improves the user experience in PowerShell.
